title: Youtube Poop: Nothing is Common in Dick Werld!
description:
That's right!  You're in The Dick Werld! ^_^

Back in the day, Pokemon vs. Digimon was THE big rivalry.  You were either for one or the other.  If you were neither, you weren't considered "in".

Myself, I was a Pokemon fan.  So why, then, did I choose to Poop this?  Because there's a shitload of Pokemon Youtube Poops up already!  We need something from the other end of the spectrum!

Also, up until this point, I had never seen an episode of this show.  Everyone had told me it was a blatant rip-off of Pokemon, so I stayed as far away from it as I could (Ya gotta admit, that's dedication!).  I couldn't BELIEVE how much material could come from this show when I finally decided to watch it!  It was calling out to me in my sleep...

Okay, I'll shut up now.  Enjoy! :)
